name: casino_domain
trigger_condition: Task involves auth, wallet, game, bonus, kyc, risk, or compliance
description: Casino domain knowledge: user authentication (JWT, sessions), wallet management (balance, transactions), game logic (RNG, rounds), bonus engine (wagering, promotions), KYC (identity verification), risk management (fraud, responsible gaming), compliance (licensing, audits).
expected_output: Domain-accurate code following casino business rules
known_limitations: Requires research documents for regulatory requirements; money-related changes need approval gate
